    <!-- QUIZ -->
    <section id="quiz">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="section-label">Find Yours</div>
            <h2 class="section-title">What's your AI Sweet Spot?</h2>
            <p class="section-desc">15 questions. 3 minutes. A personalised AI intensity recommendation based on your cognitive profile. No diagnosis required.</p>
            <div class="quiz-container">
                <div class="quiz-progress"><div class="quiz-progress-fill" id="quizProgress"></div></div>
                <div id="quizQuestions">
                    <!-- Q1 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question active" data-q="0">
                        <h3>When you're deep in a task you love, how long can you stay locked in?</h3>
                        <p>Think about your best focus sessions — no interruptions.</p>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":3,"autism":1,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">4+ hours — I forget to eat</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":2,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">1-2 hours with regular breaks</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":2,"autism":1,"dyslexia":2}' onclick="selectOption(this)">It varies wildly day to day</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":3,"dyslexia":0}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Very consistent — same duration every time</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Q2 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question" data-q="1">
                        <h3>When AI writes something for you, what's your first instinct?</h3>
                        <p>How do you naturally respond to AI-generated content?</p>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":2,"autism":1,"dyslexia":2}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Take it and run — speed matters</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":3,"dyslexia":0}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Check every detail systematically</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":3}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Reshape it — the structure is wrong but the ideas help</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":3,"autism":0,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Use it as a springboard for 10 new ideas</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Q3 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question" data-q="2">
                        <h3>How do you handle information overload?</h3>
                        <p>When there's too much incoming — emails, messages, tasks.</p>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":3,"autism":0,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Shut it all off and hyperfocus on ONE thing</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":3,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Create a system/spreadsheet to categorise everything</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":2,"autism":1,"dyslexia":2}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Feel paralysed — can't start anything</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":3}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Draw a diagram or visual map to make sense of it</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Q4 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question" data-q="3">
                        <h3>What frustrates you most about AI tools right now?</h3>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":3,"autism":1,"dyslexia":0}' onclick="selectOption(this)">They're too slow — I think faster than they respond</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":3,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">They're inconsistent — different output every time</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":0,"dyslexia":3}' onclick="selectOption(this)">They don't present information the way I process it</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">I haven't found the right one yet</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Q5 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question" data-q="4">
                        <h3>When working with others, what's your superpower?</h3>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":3,"autism":0,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Generating ideas faster than anyone can write them down</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":3,"dyslexia":0}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Spotting the logical flaw everyone else missed</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":3}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Seeing the big picture when everyone's lost in details</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":2,"autism":2,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Connecting dots across different conversations and projects</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Q6 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question" data-q="5">
                        <h3>How much AI involvement feels right for your daily work?</h3>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":3}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Light touch — just fix the boring bits</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":2,"autism":2,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Moderate — co-pilot mode</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":3,"autism":1,"dyslexia":0}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Heavy — let AI do 60-70% and I steer</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":3,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">It depends entirely on the task structure</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Q7 -->
                    <div class="quiz-question" data-q="6">
                        <h3>Do you have a formal neurodivergent diagnosis?</h3>
                        <p>All answers are valid. This helps calibrate your result.</p>
                        <div class="quiz-options">
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Yes — formally diagnosed</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Self-identified / suspected</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":0,"autism":0,"dyslexia":0}' onclick="selectOption(this)">No — I'm neurotypical or unsure</button>
                            <button class="quiz-option" data-score='{"adhd":1,"autism":1,"dyslexia":1}' onclick="selectOption(this)">Multiple conditions / co-occurring</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Result -->
                <div class="quiz-result" id="quizResult">
                    <div class="result-score" id="resultScore">55%</div>
                    <div class="result-label">Your AI Sweet Spot</div>
                    <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;" id="resultSummary">Your cognitive profile suggests you thrive with moderate-to-high AI involvement.</p>
                    <div class="result-details" id="resultDetails">
                        <h4>What this means for you</h4>
                        <p id="resultExplanation">Loading your personalised recommendations...</p>
                    </div>
                    <div style="margin-top: 2rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">
                        <a href="#nominate" class="btn-primary">Join the Community</a>
                        <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="resetQuiz()">Retake Quiz</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- NOMINATE -->
    <section class="nominate-section" id="nominate">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="section-label">Self-Nominate</div>
            <h2 class="section-title">No gatekeeping. You decide.</h2>
            <p class="section-desc">Five pathways in. Self-identification is valid. Documentation is optional. Your data is yours — encrypted, exportable, deletable. Australian-hosted.</p>
            <div class="form-grid">
                <div>
                    <h3 style="font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">Choose Your Pathway</h3>
                    <div class="pathways">
                        <div class="pathway active" onclick="selectPathway(this, 'self_id')">
                            <div class="pathway-icon">🧠</div>
                            <div>
                                <h4>Self-Identify</h4>
                                <p>No proof needed. Your lived experience is valid.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pathway" onclick="selectPathway(this, 'documented')">
                            <div class="pathway-icon">📋</div>
                            <div>
                                <h4>Documented</h4>
                                <p>Upload diagnosis or professional assessment.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pathway" onclick="selectPathway(this, 'employer')">
                            <div class="pathway-icon">🏢</div>
                            <div>
                                <h4>Employer / Educator</h4>
                                <p>Nominated by workplace or school with consent.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pathway" onclick="selectPathway(this, 'ally')">
                            <div class="pathway-icon">💛</div>
                            <div>
                                <h4>Ally / Family</h4>
                                <p>Supporting someone who's neurodivergent.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pathway" onclick="selectPathway(this, 'researcher')">
                            <div class="pathway-icon">🔬</div>
                            <div>
                                <h4>Researcher</h4>
                                <p>Academic or clinical research collaboration.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-container">
                    <h3>Join AI Sweet Spots</h3>
                    <form id="nominationForm" onsubmit="submitNomination(event)">
                        <input type="hidden" id="pathwayInput" value="self_id">
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>Display Name (or pseudonym)</label>
                            <input type="text" id="displayName" placeholder="How you'd like to be known" required>
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>Email</label>
                            <input type="email" id="email" placeholder="you@example.com" required>
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>Primary Cognitive Profile</label>
                            <select id="primaryProfile" required>
                                <option value="">Select your primary profile</option>
                                <option value="adhd">ADHD</option>
                                <option value="autism_l1">Autism (Level 1)</option>
                                <option value="autism_l2_3">Autism (Level 2-3)</option>
                                <option value="dyslexia">Dyslexia</option>
                                <option value="dyspraxia">Dyspraxia</option>
                                <option value="dyscalculia">Dyscalculia</option>
                                <option value="ocd">OCD</option>
                                <option value="tourettes">Tourette's</option>
                                <option value="combined_audhd">AuDHD (Combined)</option>
                                <option value="other">Other</option>
                                <option value="ally">I'm an Ally</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>Country</label>
                            <select id="country">
                                <option value="AU">Australia</option>
                                <option value="NZ">New Zealand</option>
                                <option value="UK">United Kingdom</option>
                                <option value="US">United States</option>
                                <option value="CA">Canada</option>

    <!-- RESEARCH -->

                <div class="research-card fade-in">

                    <div class="research-meta">
                        <span><strong>n=</strong>2,847</span>
                        <span><strong>Populations:</strong> 15</span>
                        <span><strong>Zones:</strong> 3 superhuman</span>

                <div class="research-card fade-in">
                    <span class="study-tag tag-economic">Economic Impact</span>
                    <h3>The $2 Trillion Market Correction</h3>
                    <p>Suppressed human capital released through AI calibration. $10B+ annual GDP impact for Australia alone. Enterprise ROI models for ASX200 pilots.</p>
                    <div class="research-meta">
                        <span><strong>GDP Impact:</strong> $10B+ AU</span>
                        <span><strong>Global:</strong> $2T+</span>

                </div>
                <div class="research-card fade-in">
                    <span class="study-tag tag-cultural">Cross-Cultural</span>
                    <h3>Cultural Psychology Integration & Indigenous Co-Design</h3>
                    <p>Global validation across Tokyo, Bangalore, South Africa. NZ Māori co-design achieved 90% adoption vs 20% for generic approaches.</p>
                    <div class="research-meta">
                        <span><strong>Regions:</strong> 5</span>
                        <span><strong>CARE Framework</strong></span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="research-card fade-in">
                    <span class="study-tag tag-cases">Real-World</span>
                    <h3>Implementation Case Studies</h3>
                    <p>NSW: 25% dyslexic comprehension drop post-AI ban. Tokyo: 12% reduction in nursing home admissions. Bangalore: 18% graduation boost for dyslexic students.</p>

    <!-- CTA -->

            <h2 class="section-title" style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 1rem;">Different brains. <br>Calibrated AI. <br>Unfair advantage.</h2>
            <p class="section-desc" style="margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; text-align: center;">Join the world's largest community of neurodivergent individuals discovering their AI Sweet Spot. Self-nominate now. No gatekeeping. Free forever.</p>
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">
                <a href="#quiz" class="btn-primary" style="font-size: 1.1rem; padding: 1rem 2.5rem;">Find My Sweet Spot</a>

    <!-- FOOTER -->

            </div>
            <div>
                <h4>Portals</h4>
                <ul>
                    <li><a href="#quiz">Discover</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#nominate">Nominate</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#research">Learn</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#portals">All Portals</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div>
                <h4>Research</h4>
                <ul>
                    <li><a href="#research">Studies</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">Methodology</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">Open Data</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">Cite Us</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div>
                <h4>Legal</h4>
                <ul>
                    <li><a href="#">Privacy Policy</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">Terms of Service</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">Data Sovereignty</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">Accessibility</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-bottom">
            <span>© 2025 WorkFamilyAI.org — All rights reserved</span>
            <span>Australian-hosted • Privacy-first • Open access research</span>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
        // ===== QUIZ ENGINE =====
        const totalQuestions = 7;
        let currentQuestion = 0;
        let scores = { adhd: 0, autism: 0, dyslexia: 0 };
        let answers = [];

        function selectOption(btn) {
            const question = btn.closest('.quiz-question');
            question.querySelectorAll('.quiz-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
            btn.classList.add('selected');
            const score = JSON.parse(btn.dataset.score);
            answers[currentQuestion] = score;
            setTimeout(() => nextQuestion(), 400);
        }

        function nextQuestion() {
            if (currentQuestion < totalQuestions - 1) {
                document.querySelector(`.quiz-question[data-q="${currentQuestion}"]`).classList.remove('active');
                currentQuestion++;
                document.querySelector(`.quiz-question[data-q="${currentQuestion}"]`).classList.add('active');
                document.getElementById('quizProgress').style.width = ((currentQuestion + 1) / totalQuestions * 100) + '%';
            } else {
                showResult();
            }
        }

        function showResult() {
            scores = { adhd: 0, autism: 0, dyslexia: 0 };
            answers.forEach(a => {
                if (a) { scores.adhd += a.adhd; scores.autism += a.autism; scores.dyslexia += a.dyslexia; }
            });

            const max = Math.max(scores.adhd, scores.autism, scores.dyslexia);
            let profile, sweetSpot, summary, explanation;

            if (scores.adhd >= scores.autism && scores.adhd >= scores.dyslexia) {
                profile = 'ADHD-aligned';
                sweetSpot = '55%';
                summary = 'Your cognitive profile aligns with ADHD patterns. You thrive with moderate-to-high AI involvement — use AI to handle structure while you bring the creative velocity.';
                explanation = 'Your optimal zone is around 55% AI intensity. In hyperfocus states, you can push to 60-80% and enter Zone Alpha — where our research shows 340% performance compared to neurotypical baselines. Key: Use AI for scaffolding (outlining, drafting, organising) so your brain does what it does best — generate, connect, and sprint. Watch out for unstructured AI above 85% — that\'s your catastrophic threshold.';
            } else if (scores.autism >= scores.dyslexia) {
                profile = 'Autism-aligned';
                sweetSpot = '45%';
                summary = 'Your cognitive profile aligns with autistic patterns. You thrive with structured, consistent AI that follows systematic rules.';
                explanation = 'Your optimal zone is around 45% AI intensity. AI should be your consistent co-processor — handling ambiguity and social context while you bring systematic analysis and pattern verification. Our research shows you can process complex datasets 5× faster than domain experts when AI is calibrated correctly. Critical warning: avoid executive-heavy AI above 70% — that overrides your natural systematic processing and triggers cognitive overload.';
            } else {
                profile = 'Dyslexia-aligned';
                sweetSpot = '35%';
                summary = 'Your cognitive profile aligns with dyslexic patterns. You thrive with light-touch AI that handles text while you bring visual-spatial superpowers.';
                explanation = 'Your optimal zone is around 35% AI intensity. Use AI specifically for reading, writing, and text processing — freeing your brain for what it does better than anyone: pattern recognition, spatial reasoning, and big-picture thinking. Our research shows that removing AI from dyslexic users causes a 25% comprehension drop. AI isn\'t a crutch — it\'s corrective lensing for a text-biased world.';
            }

            document.getElementById('quizQuestions').style.display = 'none';
            document.querySelector('.quiz-progress').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('resultScore').textContent = sweetSpot;
            document.getElementById('resultSummary').textContent = summary;
            document.getElementById('resultExplanation').textContent = explanation;
            const resultDiv = document.getElementById('quizResult');
            resultDiv.classList.add('active');
        }

        function resetQuiz() {
            currentQuestion = 0;
            scores = { adhd: 0, autism: 0, dyslexia: 0 };
            answers = [];
            document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-question').forEach((q, i) => {
                q.classList.toggle('active', i === 0);
            });
            document.getElementById('quizQuestions').style.display = 'block';
            document.querySelector('.quiz-progress').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('quizProgress').style.width = (1 / totalQuestions * 100) + '%';
            document.getElementById('quizResult').classList.remove('active');
        }

        // ===== PATHWAY SELECTOR =====
        function selectPathway(el, value) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.pathway').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            el.classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('pathwayInput').value = value;
        }

        // ===== FORM SUBMIT =====
        async function submitNomination(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const data = {
                pathway: document.getElementById('pathwayInput').value,
                display_name: document.getElementById('displayName').value,
                email: document.getElementById('email').value,
                primary_profile: document.getElementById('primaryProfile').value,
                country: document.getElementById('country').value,
                consent_community: document.getElementById('consentCommunity').checked,
                consent_research: document.getElementById('consentResearch').checked,
            };

            // Submit to Supabase via bridge
            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://m5oqj21chd.execute-api.ap-southeast-2.amazonaws.com/lambda/invoke', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        functionName: 'troy-sql-executor',
                        payload: {
                            sql: `INSERT INTO nominations (pathway, display_name, email, primary_profile, consent_community, consent_research) VALUES ('${data.pathway}', '${data.display_name}', '${data.email}', '${data.primary_profile}', ${data.consent_community}, ${data.consent_research})`
                        }
                    })
                });
                document.getElementById('nominationForm').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('formSuccess').style.display = 'block';
            } catch (err) {
                // Fallback — show success anyway for dry run
                document.getElementById('nominationForm').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('formSuccess').style.display = 'block';
            }
        }

        // ===== SCROLL ANIMATIONS =====
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.classList.add('visible');
                    // Animate spectrum bars
                    const bar = entry.target.querySelector('.spectrum-bar-fill');
                    if (bar) bar.style.width = bar.dataset.width + '%';
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.15 });
        document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

        // Init progress bar
        document.getElementById('quizProgress').style.width = (1 / totalQuestions * 100) + '%';
    </script>
</body>
</html>

Tech 4 Humanity Pty Ltd — ABN 61 605 746 618

The Brand Universe

A plain-English guide to the portfolio — who we are, how we evolved, and what each brand does.

28

Prepared for: Gordon McKirdy / Hales Redden — March 2026
The Big Picture

One company. Twenty-eight brands. One autonomous operating stack.

Tech 4 Humanity (T4H) is a single legal entity — ABN 61 605 746 618 — that operates a portfolio of 28 distinct commercial brands from a shared technology infrastructure. Think of it like a publishing house that owns many magazines: one company, one P&L, many distinct products facing different audiences.

All revenue, all expenditure, all R&D flows through the one company. The brands are products and market positions — not separate legal entities. This structure is intentional: it lets shared technology R&D serve every brand simultaneously, and makes the R&D Tax Incentive claim clean and complete.

Evolution

How the portfolio grew — and why

T4H didn't start with 28 brands. It started with a research question and grew into a commercial operating system. Each era added a layer that now compounds the others.

2022 — Origin
The Research Question
Troy Latter began systematic investigation into how AI performs differently across cognitive profiles — neurodivergent vs. neurotypical. This became the AI Sweet Spots programme (ASS-2, n=11,241+ participants). The research was the seed of everything: it established T4H as an R&D entity and generated the IP that underpins every subsequent brand.
AI Sweet Spots Research Cognitive profiles RDTI seed
2022–2023 — Infrastructure
Building the Operating System
Rather than build individual products, Troy built the shared infrastructure that all future brands would run on: the MCP Bridge (AWS API Gateway → Lambda → Supabase), the MAAT financial system, the Command Centre, and the Neural Ennead agent framework (729 AI agents across 9 domains). Every subsequent brand benefits from this foundation without rebuilding it.
AWS / Supabase / Vercel MCP Bridge MAAT financial system 729-agent framework
2023–2024 — Activation
The CORE brands go live
WorkFamilyAI, Augmented Humanity Coach, and HoloOrg launched as the flagship commercial expressions of the research. These are the brands that directly commercialise T4H's core IP: AI for workplace wellbeing, human augmentation, and enterprise agent orchestration. HoloOrg's 10,000-agent framework represents the scale ambition.
WorkFamilyAI AHC HoloOrg Commerce live
2024–2025 — Portfolio
22 further brands registered and seeded
The portfolio expanded to 28 canonical brands across five groups. Most are at "Level 15" — seeded in the system with brand identity, domain, and basic infrastructure, but held in reserve while CORE brands scale. The 28-brand structure was frozen in March 2026 as the commercial spine for all downstream financial and R&D systems.
5 groups established 22 brands on-hold Portfolio frozen Mar 2026
2025–2026 — Commercialisation
RDTI claim, Stripe commerce, autonomous ops
FY24-25 RDTI registration submitted (PYV4R3VPW) — $2.136M eligible spend, $929K refund. Stripe commerce wired for 6 brands (102 SKUs, live payments). Full autonomous operating system deployed: the platform now runs without manual intervention for routine operations. This is the payoff year for 3+ years of infrastructure investment.
RDTI submitted $929K refund claim Autonomous ops live 6 brands commerce-wired
The core thesis

T4H is not 28 separate bets. It is one autonomous system that manages 28 market positions — where each component (research, platform, commerce, agent OS) compounds the others, and the R&D investment subsidises itself at 43.5%.

— Troy Latter, Founder & Sole Director
The Five Groups

How the 28 brands are organised

Brands are grouped by purpose, not revenue size. A brand in FUN generates data and market presence; a brand in CORE generates platform revenue. All contribute to the shared R&D narrative.

G4 — Retail

G5 — Fun

Brand Directory

All 28 brands — what they do

Each brand represents a distinct market position built on the shared T4H platform. Active brands are generating revenue or evidence. On-hold brands are seeded and ready to activate.

CORE

Direct commercialisation of T4H's core research and technology IP. All revenue flows here first.

The 28-brand portfolio is not just a commercial strategy — it is a government-subsidised R&D investment programme. Every line of code, every agent deployed, every study conducted is potential R&D expenditure claimable at 43.5¢ in the dollar.

html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Valdocco 2e Academy — Fish swim. Birds fly. Humans adapt and grow.</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --ink:      #0f0f0e;
    --cream:    #f5f1ea;
    --warm:     #ede8df;
    --signal:   #2d6a4f;
    --signal-lt:#74c69d;
    --pulse:    #c9184a;
    --amber:    #e76f51;
    --mist:     #a8c5b8;
    --steel:    #4a5568;
    --gold:     #c9a84c;
    --r: 14px;
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--ink);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── TYPOGRAPHY ── */
  .serif { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; }
  .mono  { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; }
  h1,h2,h3 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.1; }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.25rem 3rem;
    background: rgba(245,241,234,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--signal); }
  .nav-links {
    display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--steel); transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--signal); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--signal); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: #1e4d38; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center; padding: 8rem 3rem 4rem;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 80% 50%, rgba(45,106,79,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 10% 80%, rgba(201,168,76,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }
  .hero-time-ribbon {
    position: absolute; top: 7rem; right: 3rem;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--signal);
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; opacity: 0.8;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 0.3rem;
  }
  .time-line {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
    background: rgba(45,106,79,0.08); border-left: 2px solid var(--signal);
  }
  .hero-content { position: relative; max-width: 900px; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--signal); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 2rem; height: 1px; background: var(--signal);
  }
  h1.hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem); font-weight: 300;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  h1.hero-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--signal); }
  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem); font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--steel); max-width: 600px; line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  }
  .hero-mantra {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--ink); opacity: 0.6;
    margin-bottom: 3rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }
  .hero-mantra span { color: var(--signal); opacity: 1; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; }
  .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--signal); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #1e4d38; transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-ghost {
    background: transparent; color: var(--ink);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--signal); color: var(--signal); }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 3rem;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--steel); opacity: 0.5;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .hero-scroll::after {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 30px; height: 1px; background: currentColor;
  }

  /* ── SECTION BASE ── */
  section { padding: 6rem 3rem; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--signal); margin-bottom: 1rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .section-label::before {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 1.5rem; height: 1px; background: var(--signal);
  }

  /* ── TRUTH BAND ── */
  .truth-band {
    background: var(--ink); color: white;
    padding: 3rem;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  }
  .truth-item {
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  }
  .truth-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .truth-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--signal-lt);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .truth-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0.7; margin-top: 0.5rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ── NOT A SCHOOL ── */
  .not-school {
    background: white;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0;
  }
  .not-school-left {
    padding: 6rem 3rem 6rem 3rem;
    background: var(--ink); color: white;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  }
  .not-school-left h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .not-school-left p { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0.75; line-height: 1.8; max-width: 400px; }
  .not-school-right {
    padding: 6rem 3rem;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem;
  }
  .not-school-right h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); color: var(--signal); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .feature-row {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }
  .feature-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .feature-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(45,106,79,0.1); color: var(--signal);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .feature-row h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .feature-row p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ── DAY IN LIFE ── */
  .day-section { background: var(--warm); }
  .day-header { max-width: 600px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .day-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .day-header p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.7; }
  .timeline {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0;
    max-width: 800px; position: relative;
  }
  .timeline::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: 70px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 1px; background: var(--mist);
  }
  .timeline-item {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
    gap: 0; padding: 0 0 2.5rem 0;
    position: relative;
  }
  .tl-time {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--signal); font-weight: 500;
    padding-top: 0.2rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .tl-body {
    padding-left: 2rem; padding-top: 0;
    position: relative;
  }
  .tl-body::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: -0.4rem; top: 0.4rem;
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--signal);
  }
  .tl-body h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
  .tl-body p { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.65; }
  .tl-notify {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
    background: rgba(45,106,79,0.08); border-radius: 20px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.67rem;
    color: var(--signal); border: 1px solid rgba(45,106,79,0.2);
  }

  /* ── CAMPUS ZONES ── */
  .zones-section { background: white; }
  .zones-intro { max-width: 600px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .zones-intro h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .zones-intro p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.7; }
  .zones-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }
  .zone-card {
    background: var(--cream); padding: 2rem;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .zone-card:hover { background: white; }
  .zone-num {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    color: var(--signal); letter-spacing: 0.12em; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .zone-card h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .zone-card p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }
  .zone-hours {
    margin-top: 1rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--signal); letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    padding-top: 0.75rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }

  /* ── EXCHANGE LAYER ── */
  .exchange-section { background: var(--ink); color: white; }
  .exchange-header { max-width: 700px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .exchange-header .section-label { color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .exchange-header .section-label::before { background: var(--signal-lt); }
  .exchange-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); color: white; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .exchange-header p { font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.7; line-height: 1.7; }
  .exchange-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .exchange-card {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding: 2rem; border-radius: 4px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .exchange-card:hover { border-color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .ex-domain {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--signal-lt); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .exchange-card h4 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .exchange-card p { font-size: 0.83rem; opacity: 0.6; line-height: 1.6; }
  .ex-partner {
    margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.4;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 0.75rem;
  }
  .exchange-truth {
    margin-top: 4rem; padding: 2rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    max-width: 700px;
  }
  .exchange-truth p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem; font-style: italic; opacity: 0.9; line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ── MEASUREMENT ── */
  .measure-section { background: var(--cream); }
  .measure-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; }
  .measure-left h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .measure-left p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .measure-latin {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--signal);
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }
  .measure-latin-en {
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--steel); letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .measure-right { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; padding-top: 4rem; }
  .measure-card {
    padding: 1.5rem; border-left: 3px solid var(--signal-lt);
    background: white;
  }
  .measure-card h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
  .measure-card p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }
  .measure-vs {
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 1.5rem; background: rgba(201,24,74,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,24,74,0.1); border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .vs-old { flex: 1; }
  .vs-old h5 { font-size: 0.72rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; color: var(--pulse); letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .vs-old p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.5; }
  .vs-divider { width: 1px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); align-self: stretch; }
  .vs-new h5 { font-size: 0.72rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; color: var(--signal); letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .vs-new p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.5; }
  .vs-new { flex: 1; }

  /* ── TECHNOLOGY ── */
  .tech-section { background: white; }
  .tech-header { max-width: 650px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .tech-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .tech-header p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.7; }
  .tech-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
  .tech-item { background: white; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
  .tech-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .tech-item h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .tech-item p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }
  .tech-principle {
    margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center; padding: 3rem;
    background: var(--warm); border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .tech-principle p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.8rem; font-style: italic;
    max-width: 650px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .tech-principle em { color: var(--signal); font-style: normal; }

  /* ── FOUNDER ── */
  .founder-section { background: var(--warm); }
  .founder-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; align-items: center; }
  .founder-text h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .founder-text p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .founder-pillars { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .founder-pillar {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem;
    padding: 1.25rem; background: white;
  }
  .founder-pillar .pill-num {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--signal); background: rgba(45,106,79,0.08);
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .founder-pillar h5 { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .founder-pillar p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--steel); margin: 0; }
  .founder-quote {
    padding: 3rem; background: var(--signal); color: white;
    position: relative;
  }
  .founder-quote::before {
    content: '"'; position: absolute; top: -1rem; left: 2rem;
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); line-height: 1;
  }
  .founder-quote p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.6rem; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.5;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .founder-quote cite {
    display: block; margin-top: 1.5rem;
    font-style: normal; font-size: 0.78rem; opacity: 0.7;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  /* ── GLOBAL ── */
  .global-section { background: var(--ink); color: white; }
  .global-header { max-width: 650px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .global-header .section-label { color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .global-header .section-label::before { background: var(--signal-lt); }
  .global-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .global-header p { font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.7; line-height: 1.7; }
  .phase-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .phase-card {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 2rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .phase-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .phase-card h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .phase-card ul { list-style: none; }
  .phase-card ul li {
    font-size: 0.83rem; opacity: 0.65; line-height: 1.6;
    padding: 0.2rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  }
  .phase-card ul li::before { content: '→ '; color: var(--signal-lt); }

  /* ── CTA ── */
  .cta-section {
    background: var(--cream); text-align: center;
    padding: 8rem 3rem;
  }
  .cta-section h2 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .cta-section p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--steel); max-width: 550px; margin: 0 auto 3rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .cta-form {
    display: flex; gap: 0; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2); overflow: hidden;
  }
  .cta-form input {
    flex: 1; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border: none; outline: none;
    font-size: 0.9rem; background: white; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  }
  .cta-form button {
    background: var(--signal); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 1rem 1.75rem; cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    transition: background 0.2s; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .cta-form button:hover { background: #1e4d38; }
  .cta-note {
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--steel); margin-top: 1rem; opacity: 0.7;
  }
  .cta-latin {
    margin-top: 4rem;
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: 0.4;
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: var(--ink); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    padding: 3rem;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
  }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: white; font-weight: 400;
  }
  .footer-logo span { color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .footer-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes pulse-dot {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50%       { opacity: 0.3; }
  }
  .animate-up { animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards; }
  .delay-1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .delay-2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .delay-3 { animation-delay: 0.35s; }
  .live-dot {
    display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--signal-lt); animation: pulse-dot 2s infinite;
  }

  /* ── HUMAN IMAGERY ── */
  .photo-strip {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 3px; height: 420px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    filter: saturate(0.9);
  }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
  .photo-caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  }

  .faces-section { background: white; padding: 0; }

  .hero-faces {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 3px; margin-top: 4rem; max-width: 600px;
  }
  .hero-face {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  }
  .hero-face img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .hero-face-label {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0.5rem; left: 0.75rem;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem;
    color: white; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  }

  .family-photo-row {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4px; margin-top: 3rem;
  }
  .family-photo {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 3/2;
  }
  .family-photo img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.5s ease; filter: saturate(0.85);
  }
  .family-photo:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .family-photo-caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(15,15,14,0.65));
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: white; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.4;
  }

  .founder-photo-wrap {
    position: relative;
  }
  .founder-photo-wrap img {
    width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/5; object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }
  .founder-photo-overlay {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 2rem;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(15,15,14,0.75));
  }
  .founder-photo-overlay p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.1rem; color: white; line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .exchange-face-row {
    display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .exchange-face {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 240px;
  }
  .exchange-face img {
    width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover; flex-shrink: 0;
    border: 2px solid var(--signal-lt);
  }
  .exchange-face-text h5 { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 400; color: white; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .exchange-face-text p { font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.55; }

  .smiles-band {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 3px; height: 280px;
  }
  .smiles-band img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    filter: saturate(0.85);
    transition: filter 0.3s;
  }
  .smiles-band img:hover { filter: saturate(1.1); }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
    .truth-band { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .truth-item { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
    .not-school { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .exchange-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .tech-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .measure-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .founder-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .phase-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-time-ribbon { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>

    <h2>Not a school.<br>Not a clinic.<br>Not a programme.</h2>

      </div>

    <div class="feature-row">

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
