<!-- DAY IN LIFE -->
<section class="day-section">
  <div class="day-header">
    <div class="section-label">A day at Valdocco</div>
    <h2>Life doesn't run 9 to 3.<br>Neither do we.</h2>
    <p>This isn't a schedule. It's a flow. No bells. No rigid blocks. Everything responds to the child — not the other way around.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">6:15am</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>Arrival — no sign-in queue, no explanation required</h4>
        <p>Their phone pings. "Good morning. Today starts light — reading block at 7:10. Room 3 is ready." The child walks in. Already known.</p>
        <span class="tl-notify"><span class="live-dot"></span> System recognised. Day configured.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">7:12am</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>Reading — the system listens quietly</h4>
        <p>A child reads aloud. The AI tracks fluency, catches patterns, notices hesitation. No interruption. No pressure. When they finish: "You're ready for the next level."</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">8:05am</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>Parent insight — instantly, in plain English</h4>
        <p>"Reading confidence improving. Pauses still showing on longer sentences. We're working on that today."</p>
        <span class="tl-notify"><span class="live-dot"></span> Sent to parent app — no waiting, no chasing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">9:30am</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>Real world enters — a researcher, a builder, a maker</h4>
        <p>A small group talks with someone from UNSW. One child has been obsessed with insects for months. This isn't a guest talk. It's a conversation — questions, ideas, direction. It feels normal.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">11:00am</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>Support happens quietly</h4>
        <p>A child is overwhelmed. They shift spaces. Someone meets them there. No labels. No disruption. The day continues.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">5:30pm</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>Extended day — still going</h4>
        <p>A small group works on a project. Another is in a quiet reading zone. One child is fully engaged at 7pm. That's not a problem. That's the point.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-time">8:45pm</div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <h4>End of day report</h4>
        <p>"Strong day. Reading progressed. Confidence up. Next focus: comprehension depth." No surprises. No jargon. Clear.</p>
        <span class="tl-notify"><span class="live-dot"></span> 22:00 — building closes. Rooms used all day.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CAMPUS ZONES -->
<section class="zones-section" id="campus">
  <div class="zones-intro">
    <div class="section-label">The campus</div>
    <h2>A micro-city for<br>learning and life.</h2>
    <p>Seven distinct zones. Never idle. Each one designed to remove friction, not add structure. School is just one part of what happens here.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="zones-grid">
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">01 — LEARNING CORE</div>
      <h3>Where capability is built</h3>
      <p>Adaptive AI-assisted learning. No fixed year levels. Quiet zones, deep work, accelerated pathways. The system adjusts to the child, not the timetable.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">06:00 — 22:00 daily</div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">02 — SIGNAL + HEALTH</div>
      <h3>Where regulation is supported</h3>
      <p>GP, paediatric, psychology, OT, speech — integrated into the day. No separate appointment. No disruption. Support flows with learning.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">Embedded — not scheduled</div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">03 — FAMILY LAYER</div>
      <h3>Where families belong</h3>
      <p>Parent co-working. Coaching. Sibling inclusion. You don't drop off and leave. You stay, if that's what the family needs. Most days, it is.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">06:00 — 22:00 daily</div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">04 — BUILD + EXPLORATION</div>
      <h3>Where weird interests become assets</h3>
      <p>Robotics. Creative studios. Trade exposure. Engineering. Kids don't get redirected away from obsessions — they get depth and resources.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">All day, weekends active</div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">05 — EXCHANGE LAYER</div>
      <h3>Where the world comes to them</h3>
      <p>Expert rooms. University partners. Industry mentors. Children don't wait until adulthood. The match is made when they're ready — not when the curriculum says so.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">Ongoing, not one-off</div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">06 — COMMUNITY + SERVICES</div>
      <h3>Where the hub extends beyond schooling</h3>
      <p>Café. Nutrition support. Allied health tenancy. Specialist rotation. Local community programs. Rooms in use all day, all week.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">Community open hours</div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-card">
      <div class="zone-num">07 — MOVEMENT + REGULATION</div>
      <h3>Where bodies reset</h3>
      <p>Gym. Sensory movement spaces. Outdoor reset zones. Movement isn't a break from learning. It's part of the system.</p>
      <div class="zone-hours">06:00 — 22:00 daily</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXCHANGE LAYER -->
<section class="exchange-section" id="exchange">
  <div class="exchange-header">
    <div class="section-label">The exchange layer</div>
    <h2>We don't wait for children to grow into the world.<br>We bring the world to them.</h2>
    <p>When a seven-year-old can catalogue 42 insect species, they shouldn't wait until university to talk to someone who cares. We connect them now. But we prepare both sides.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="exchange-grid">
    <div class="exchange-card">
      <div class="ex-domain">Entomology → UNSW</div>
      <h4>The cicada kid</h4>
      <p>At 7, Liam catalogued 42 cicada species. We connected him with a UNSW entomologist. By 8, he was contributing to field notes. Not in a classroom. In a real conversation.</p>
      <div class="ex-partner">University of New South Wales — Biological Sciences</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exchange-card">
      <div class="ex-domain">Coding → Industry</div>
      <h4>The Roblox architect</h4>
      <p>Maya builds physics engines in Roblox at age 9. She now collaborates weekly with a game developer. Communication scaffolded. Relationship ongoing.</p>
      <div class="ex-partner">Industry partner — game development studio</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exchange-card">
      <div class="ex-domain">Trade → Engineering</div>
      <h4>The restless builder</h4>
      <p>Ethan couldn't stay in a classroom. Now he spends three afternoons a week in a mechanical workshop with a real tradesperson. Both of them had to learn to communicate.</p>
      <div class="ex-partner">Trade partner — mechanical engineering</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="exchange-face-row">
    <div class="exchange-face">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612349317150-e413f6a5b16d?w=120&h=120&fit=crop&crop=face" alt="Expert mentor" loading="lazy">
      <div class="exchange-face-text">
        <h5>Dr. Sarah Chen</h5>
        <p>UNSW — Biological Sciences<br>Paired with Liam, age 7</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="exchange-face">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560250097-0b93528c311a?w=120&h=120&fit=crop&crop=face" alt="Industry mentor" loading="lazy">
      <div class="exchange-face-text">
        <h5>James Tran</h5>
        <p>Game Developer, Sydney<br>Paired with Maya, age 9</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="exchange-face">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=120&h=120&fit=crop&crop=face" alt="Trade mentor" loading="lazy">
      <div class="exchange-face-text">
        <h5>Mark O'Brien</h5>
        <p>Mechanical Engineer<br>Paired with Ethan, age 10</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="exchange-truth">
    <p>"You don't judge a fish by how it runs. We build the environment that matches what they actually are."</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MEASUREMENT -->
<section class="measure-section">
  <div class="section-label">How we measure</div>
  <div class="measure-grid">
    <div class="measure-left">
      <h2>We measure fish by how they swim — not how they run.</h2>
      <p>Every child gets a profile-based measurement system, not a grade-based one. We track rate of growth in strength areas, ability to apply capability in real contexts, and regulation stability over time.</p>
      <p>Not because we're lowering standards. Because we're measuring the right thing.</p>
      <div class="measure-latin">Pisces natant. Aves volant. Homines adaptantur et crescunt.</div>
      <div class="measure-latin-en">Fish swim. Birds fly. Humans adapt and grow.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="measure-right">
      <div class="vs-measure">
        <div class="measure-card">
          <h4>Capability strengths</h4>
          <p>Where does this child excel? Pattern recognition, systems thinking, creative construction, deep research? We find it, then we build from it.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="measure-card" style="margin-top:1.5rem">
          <h4>Constraint zones</h4>
          <p>Where do they need scaffolding? Executive function, sensory regulation, social translation? We name it clearly and address it directly.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="measure-card" style="margin-top:1.5rem">
          <h4>Growth vectors</h4>
          <p>What's next for this specific child? Not what year level says. What their actual trajectory says.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="vs-measure" style="margin-top:1.5rem">
        <div class="measure-vs">
          <div class="vs-old">
            <h5>OLD MODEL</h5>
            <p>Is the child at Year 3 level? Are they meeting the standard?</p>
          </div>
          <div class="vs-divider"></div>
          <div class="vs-new">
            <h5>VALDOCCO</h5>
            <p>How fast are they growing in their strengths? Where do they need support next?</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TECHNOLOGY -->
<section class="tech-section" id="technology">
  <div class="tech-header">
    <div class="section-label">How technology works here</div>
    <h2>Modern systems.<br>Invisible infrastructure.</h2>
    <p>We don't modernise old systems. We replace them. Technology runs underneath — not on top of — the human environment. You feel the outcomes. You don't see the machinery.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-grid">
    <div class="tech-item">
      <div class="tech-icon">📡</div>
      <h4>Signal Capture</h4>
      <p>Real-time regulation and readiness tracking. Drives when to push, when to support, when to shift zones.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="tech-item">
      <div class="tech-icon">📖</div>
      <h4>Literacy Intelligence</h4>
      <p>AI-powered running records. Error classification. Fluency scoring. Next-text recommendation. Intervention triggered automatically when needed.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="tech-item">
      <div class="tech-icon">🔗</div>
      <h4>Expert Matching</h4>
      <p>Talent spikes detected, depth scored, matched to relevant experts. Both sides prepared. Relationship ongoing, not one-off.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="tech-item">
      <div class="tech-icon">📲</div>
      <h4>Parent OS</h4>
      <p>Real-time updates in plain English. No report card surprises. No chasing. Clear insights when they matter.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-principle">
    <p>Parents don't buy <em>AI</em>. They buy <em>clarity, progress, and their child being understood</em>. Technology is how we deliver that. Not what we sell.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOUNDER -->
<section class="founder-section" id="founders">
  <div class="founder-grid">
    <div class="founder-text">
      <div class="section-label">Why this exists</div>
      <h2>Built from lived experience. Backed by research.</h2>
      <p>Valdocco didn't start as a business idea. It started with real research into how children learn differently, direct exposure to the gaps in the system, and a personal reality — having a family, a daughter, navigating this exact terrain.</p>
      <p>Our partner brings specialist expertise in childhood education and development. We bring research across education, technology, and human systems — and the practical capability to build something fundamentally different.</p>
      <div class="founder-pillars">
        <div class="founder-pillar">
          <span class="pill-num">01</span>
          <div>
            <h5>Lived experience</h5>
            <p>We are part of the system we're redesigning.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="founder-pillar">
          <span class="pill-num">02</span>
          <div>
            <h5>Professional expertise</h5>
            <p>Specialist knowledge in childhood education and development. AI Sweet Spots research — 11,241+ participants, 9 cognitive profiles.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="founder-pillar">
          <span class="pill-num">03</span>
          <div>
            <h5>Evidence base</h5>
            <p>Research, surveys, and cross-sector experience confirming the gap is real, structural, and growing.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="founder-photo-wrap">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476703993599-0035a21b17a9?w=600&h=750&fit=crop&crop=faces" alt="Family moment — together" loading="lazy">
      <div class="founder-photo-overlay">
        <p>"We're not building this for families like ours.<br>We're building it because we are one."</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GLOBAL -->
<section class="global-section">
  <div class="global-header">
    <div class="section-label">Global by design</div>
    <h2>One campus.<br>One model.<br>Every city.</h2>
    <p>We're not building a local school. We're designing a replicable operating system for 2e families — launching in South Sydney and expanding to wherever the gap exists.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="phase-grid">
    <div class="phase-card">
      <div class="phase-label">Phase 1 — Australia</div>
      <h3>Shire Flagship</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Shire — founding campus</li>
        <li>Sydney x2</li>
        <li>Melbourne</li>
        <li>Brisbane</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="phase-card">
      <div class="phase-label">Phase 2 — English-speaking markets</div>
      <h3>International Nodes</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>United Kingdom</li>
        <li>Singapore</li>
        <li>United Arab Emirates</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="phase-card">
      <div class="phase-label">Phase 3 — Global</div>
      <h3>IHDC Network</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>US (select cities)</li>
        <li>EU (targeted)</li>
        <li>Central intelligence layer</li>
        <li>Same model, local compliance</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SMILING KIDS — the real product -->
<div style="background:var(--ink);">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:3px;height:320px;">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542810634-71277d95dcbb?w=300&h=320&fit=crop&crop=face" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(0.8)" alt="Child smiling" loading="lazy">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596436280429-3f2c2ac04ee6?w=300&h=320&fit=crop&crop=faces" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(0.8)" alt="Kids learning together" loading="lazy">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1577896851231-70ef18881754?w=300&h=320&fit=crop&crop=face" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(0.8)" alt="Child exploring" loading="lazy">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516627145497-ae6968895b74?w=300&h=320&fit=crop&crop=face" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(0.8)" alt="Child building" loading="lazy">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1491308056676-205b7c9a7dc1?w=300&h=320&fit=crop&crop=faces" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(0.8)" alt="Family learning" loading="lazy">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503676260728-1c00da094a0b?w=300&h=320&fit=crop&crop=face" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(0.8)" alt="Child reading" loading="lazy">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="cta-section">
  <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center">Join the founding cohort</div>
  <h2>Start with<br>a conversation.</h2>
  <p>We're taking expressions of interest for our founding intake. Small cohort. High support. High ratio. We want to meet the families who've been waiting for this.</p>
  <div class="cta-form">
    <input type="email" placeholder="Your email address">
    <button>Join Waitlist</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cta-note">We will contact you directly. No automated sequences. A real conversation.</div>
  <div class="cta-latin">Pisces natant. Aves volant. Homines adaptantur et crescunt.</div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">Valdocco <span>2e</span> Academy</div>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="#">Model</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Campus</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Enquire</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Tech 4 Humanity</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div>© 2026 Tech 4 Humanity Pty Ltd · ABN 70 666 271 272</div>
</footer>

<script>
// Simple scroll animations
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) {
      e.target.style.opacity = '1';
      e.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });

document.querySelectorAll('.zone-card, .exchange-card, .phase-card, .measure-card, .founder-pillar, .tl-body').forEach(el => {
  el.style.opacity = '0';
  el.style.transform = 'translateY(16px)';
  el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
  observer.observe(el);
});

// Live clock in hero ribbon
function updateTime() {
  const now = new Date();
  const t = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-AU', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', hour12: false, timeZone: 'Australia/Sydney' });
  const el = document.querySelector('.hero-time-ribbon .time-line:first-child');
  if (el) el.innerHTML = `<span class="live-dot"></span> ${t} — Sydney`;
}
updateTime(); setInterval(updateTime, 30000);

// Waitlist form
document.querySelectorAll('.nav-cta, .btn-primary, .cta-form button').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const email = document.querySelector('.cta-form input')?.value;
    if (email && email.includes('@')) {
      alert('Thank you. We will be in touch directly.');
    } else {
      document.querySelector('.cta-section')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>

title: valdocco_homepage (1).html
html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Valdocco 2e Academy — Fish swim. Birds fly. Humans adapt and grow.</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --ink:      #0f0f0e;
    --cream:    #f5f1ea;
    --warm:     #ede8df;
    --signal:   #2d6a4f;
    --signal-lt:#74c69d;
    --pulse:    #c9184a;
    --amber:    #e76f51;
    --mist:     #a8c5b8;
    --steel:    #4a5568;
    --gold:     #c9a84c;
    --r: 14px;
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--ink);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── TYPOGRAPHY ── */
  .serif { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; }
  .mono  { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; }
  h1,h2,h3 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.1; }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.25rem 3rem;
    background: rgba(245,241,234,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--signal); }
  .nav-links {
    display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--steel); transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--signal); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--signal); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: #1e4d38; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center; padding: 8rem 3rem 4rem;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 80% 50%, rgba(45,106,79,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 10% 80%, rgba(201,168,76,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }
  .hero-time-ribbon {
    position: absolute; top: 7rem; right: 3rem;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--signal);
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; opacity: 0.8;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 0.3rem;
  }
  .time-line {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
    background: rgba(45,106,79,0.08); border-left: 2px solid var(--signal);
  }
  .hero-content { position: relative; max-width: 900px; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--signal); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 2rem; height: 1px; background: var(--signal);
  }
  h1.hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem); font-weight: 300;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  h1.hero-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--signal); }
  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem); font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--steel); max-width: 600px; line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  }
  .hero-mantra {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--ink); opacity: 0.6;
    margin-bottom: 3rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }
  .hero-mantra span { color: var(--signal); opacity: 1; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; }
  .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--signal); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #1e4d38; transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-ghost {
    background: transparent; color: var(--ink);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--signal); color: var(--signal); }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 3rem;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--steel); opacity: 0.5;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .hero-scroll::after {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 30px; height: 1px; background: currentColor;
  }

  /* ── SECTION BASE ── */
  section { padding: 6rem 3rem; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--signal); margin-bottom: 1rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .section-label::before {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 1.5rem; height: 1px; background: var(--signal);
  }

  /* ── TRUTH BAND ── */
  .truth-band {
    background: var(--ink); color: white;
    padding: 3rem;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  }
  .truth-item {
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  }
  .truth-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .truth-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--signal-lt);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .truth-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0.7; margin-top: 0.5rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ── NOT A SCHOOL ── */
  .not-school {
    background: white;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0;
  }
  .not-school-left {
    padding: 6rem 3rem 6rem 3rem;
    background: var(--ink); color: white;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  }
  .not-school-left h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .not-school-left p { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0.75; line-height: 1.8; max-width: 400px; }
  .not-school-right {
    padding: 6rem 3rem;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem;
  }
  .not-school-right h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); color: var(--signal); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .feature-row {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }
  .feature-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .feature-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(45,106,79,0.1); color: var(--signal);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .feature-row h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .feature-row p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ── DAY IN LIFE ── */
  .day-section { background: var(--warm); }
  .day-header { max-width: 600px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .day-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .day-header p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.7; }
  .timeline {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0;
    max-width: 800px; position: relative;
  }
  .timeline::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: 70px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 1px; background: var(--mist);
  }
  .timeline-item {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
    gap: 0; padding: 0 0 2.5rem 0;
    position: relative;
  }
  .tl-time {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--signal); font-weight: 500;
    padding-top: 0.2rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .tl-body {
    padding-left: 2rem; padding-top: 0;
    position: relative;
  }
  .tl-body::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: -0.4rem; top: 0.4rem;
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--signal);
  }
  .tl-body h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
  .tl-body p { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.65; }
  .tl-notify {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
    background: rgba(45,106,79,0.08); border-radius: 20px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.67rem;
    color: var(--signal); border: 1px solid rgba(45,106,79,0.2);
  }

  /* ── CAMPUS ZONES ── */
  .zones-section { background: white; }
  .zones-intro { max-width: 600px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .zones-intro h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .zones-intro p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.7; }
  .zones-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }
  .zone-card {
    background: var(--cream); padding: 2rem;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .zone-card:hover { background: white; }
  .zone-num {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    color: var(--signal); letter-spacing: 0.12em; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .zone-card h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .zone-card p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }
  .zone-hours {
    margin-top: 1rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--signal); letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    padding-top: 0.75rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }

  /* ── EXCHANGE LAYER ── */
  .exchange-section { background: var(--ink); color: white; }
  .exchange-header { max-width: 700px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .exchange-header .section-label { color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .exchange-header .section-label::before { background: var(--signal-lt); }
  .exchange-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); color: white; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .exchange-header p { font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.7; line-height: 1.7; }
  .exchange-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .exchange-card {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding: 2rem; border-radius: 4px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .exchange-card:hover { border-color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .ex-domain {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--signal-lt); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .exchange-card h4 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .exchange-card p { font-size: 0.83rem; opacity: 0.6; line-height: 1.6; }
  .ex-partner {
    margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.4;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 0.75rem;
  }
  .exchange-truth {
    margin-top: 4rem; padding: 2rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    max-width: 700px;
  }
  .exchange-truth p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem; font-style: italic; opacity: 0.9; line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ── MEASUREMENT ── */
  .measure-section { background: var(--cream); }
  .measure-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; }
  .measure-left h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .measure-left p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .measure-latin {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--signal);
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }
  .measure-latin-en {
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--steel); letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .measure-right { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; padding-top: 4rem; }
  .measure-card {
    padding: 1.5rem; border-left: 3px solid var(--signal-lt);
    background: white;
  }
  .measure-card h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
  .measure-card p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }
  .measure-vs {
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 1.5rem; background: rgba(201,24,74,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,24,74,0.1); border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .vs-old { flex: 1; }
  .vs-old h5 { font-size: 0.72rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; color: var(--pulse); letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .vs-old p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.5; }
  .vs-divider { width: 1px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); align-self: stretch; }
  .vs-new h5 { font-size: 0.72rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; color: var(--signal); letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .vs-new p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.5; }
  .vs-new { flex: 1; }

  /* ── TECHNOLOGY ── */
  .tech-section { background: white; }
  .tech-header { max-width: 650px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .tech-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .tech-header p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.7; }
  .tech-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
  .tech-item { background: white; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
  .tech-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .tech-item h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .tech-item p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.6; }
  .tech-principle {
    margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center; padding: 3rem;
    background: var(--warm); border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .tech-principle p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.8rem; font-style: italic;
    max-width: 650px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .tech-principle em { color: var(--signal); font-style: normal; }

  /* ── FOUNDER ── */
  .founder-section { background: var(--warm); }
  .founder-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; align-items: center; }
  .founder-text h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .founder-text p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--steel); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .founder-pillars { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .founder-pillar {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem;
    padding: 1.25rem; background: white;
  }
  .founder-pillar .pill-num {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--signal); background: rgba(45,106,79,0.08);
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .founder-pillar h5 { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .founder-pillar p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--steel); margin: 0; }
  .founder-quote {
    padding: 3rem; background: var(--signal); color: white;
    position: relative;
  }
  .founder-quote::before {
    content: '"'; position: absolute; top: -1rem; left: 2rem;
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); line-height: 1;
  }
  .founder-quote p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.6rem; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.5;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .founder-quote cite {
    display: block; margin-top: 1.5rem;
    font-style: normal; font-size: 0.78rem; opacity: 0.7;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  /* ── GLOBAL ── */
  .global-section { background: var(--ink); color: white; }
  .global-header { max-width: 650px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .global-header .section-label { color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .global-header .section-label::before { background: var(--signal-lt); }
  .global-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .global-header p { font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.7; line-height: 1.7; }
  .phase-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .phase-card {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 2rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .phase-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .phase-card h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .phase-card ul { list-style: none; }
  .phase-card ul li {
    font-size: 0.83rem; opacity: 0.65; line-height: 1.6;
    padding: 0.2rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  }
  .phase-card ul li::before { content: '→ '; color: var(--signal-lt); }

  /* ── CTA ── */
  .cta-section {
    background: var(--cream); text-align: center;
    padding: 8rem 3rem;
  }
  .cta-section h2 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .cta-section p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--steel); max-width: 550px; margin: 0 auto 3rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .cta-form {
    display: flex; gap: 0; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2); overflow: hidden;
  }
  .cta-form input {
    flex: 1; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border: none; outline: none;
    font-size: 0.9rem; background: white; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  }
  .cta-form button {
    background: var(--signal); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 1rem 1.75rem; cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    transition: background 0.2s; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .cta-form button:hover { background: #1e4d38; }
  .cta-note {
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--steel); margin-top: 1rem; opacity: 0.7;
  }
  .cta-latin {
    margin-top: 4rem;
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: 0.4;
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: var(--ink); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    padding: 3rem;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
  }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: white; font-weight: 400;
  }
  .footer-logo span { color: var(--signal-lt); }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .footer-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes pulse-dot {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50%       { opacity: 0.3; }
  }
  .animate-up { animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards; }
  .delay-1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .delay-2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .delay-3 { animation-delay: 0.35s; }
  .live-dot {
    display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--signal-lt); animation: pulse-dot 2s infinite;
  }

  /* ── HUMAN IMAGERY ── */
  .photo-strip {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 3px; height: 420px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    filter: saturate(0.9);
  }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .photo-strip .photo-cell.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
  .photo-caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  }

  .faces-section { background: white; padding: 0; }

  .hero-faces {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 3px; margin-top: 4rem; max-width: 600px;
  }
  .hero-face {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  }
  .hero-face img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .hero-face-label {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0.5rem; left: 0.75rem;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem;
    color: white; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  }

  .family-photo-row {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4px; margin-top: 3rem;
  }
  .family-photo {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 3/2;
  }
  .family-photo img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.5s ease; filter: saturate(0.85);
  }
  .family-photo:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .family-photo-caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(15,15,14,0.65));
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: white; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.4;
  }

  .founder-photo-wrap {
    position: relative;
  }
  .founder-photo-wrap img {
    width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/5; object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }
  .founder-photo-overlay {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 2rem;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(15,15,14,0.75));
  }
  .founder-photo-overlay p {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.1rem; color: white; line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .exchange-face-row {
    display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .exchange-face {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 240px;
  }
  .exchange-face img {
    width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover; flex-shrink: 0;
    border: 2px solid var(--signal-lt);
  }
  .exchange-face-text h5 { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 400; color: white; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .exchange-face-text p { font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.55; }

  .smiles-band {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 3px; height: 280px;
  }
  .smiles-band img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    filter: saturate(0.85);
    transition: filter 0.3s;
  }
  .smiles-band img:hover { filter: saturate(1.1); }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
    .truth-band { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .truth-item { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
    .not-school { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .exchange-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .tech-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .measure-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .founder-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .phase-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-time-ribbon { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
